description: Hand-curated expectations for the bundled Q3 planning meeting. Used by metrics.py and the LLM-as-judge evaluator. Values here are not exact outputs but constraints the synthesis must satisfy.

required_topics.rationale: Theme 1 of the meeting was about POS outages. This must be picked up.
Theme 2 was about search surfacing out-of-stock items.
Theme 3 was about pharmacy refill confusion.
Theme 4 was about loyalty tier confusion.

forbidden_topics.rationale: Explicitly declined in the meeting (`Things we explicitly said NO to`).

expected_duplicates.rationale: NS-412 is the in-progress 'in stock at your store' badge fix — clearly the same problem space.
NS-389 is the loyalty tier downgrade email — same theme.

expected_constraint_conflicts.rationale: Card sales offline are explicitly FORBIDDEN by Section 4 of the architecture wiki. Any story proposing this should be flagged.
